SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.join
Interface JoinableContainer

All Superinterfaces:
Joinable, JoinEventNotifier
All Known Subinterfaces:
MediaGroup, MediaMixer, MixerAdapter, NetworkConnection
public interface JoinableContainer
extends Joinable, JoinEventNotifier

A Joinable object that contains multiple streams.
Provides accessors to objects representing those streams: JoinableStream's.
A JoinableStream is also a Joinable, and can be used in place of its container, to restrict a join operation for example.
A JoinableContainer has a non-mutable number of streams, determined when the object is built.
When a JoinableContainer A is joined to another JoinableContainer B, each stream of A is joined to the corresponding stream of B: audio to audio, video to video, etc.

Examples of JoinableContainer are MediaGroup, NetworkConnection, MediaMixer

 JoinableStream getJoinableStream(JoinableStream.StreamType value)

Methods inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable
getJoinees, getJoinees, join, joinInitiate, unjoin, unjoinInitiate

addListener, getMediaSession, removeListener
 

Method Detail

getJoinableStream

JoinableStream getJoinableStream(JoinableStream.StreamType value)
                                 throws MsControlException
Parameters:
value - Identifies a type of media, like audio, video ... see JoinableStream.StreamType.
Returns:
a JoinableStream, referencing the media of the given type;
It can be used to restrict a join to this specific stream.
null if the container does not support this type of media.
Throws:
MsControlException

getJoinableStreams

JoinableStream[] getJoinableStreams()
                                    throws MsControlException
Returns:
an array of all existing streams.
The array may contain more than one stream of each type (e.g. two audio, one video).
Throws:
MsControlException
